ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, producer, merchant, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for wine types, regions, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine */,
  "wine_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine */,
  "wine_type" TEXT /* Type of wine (e.g., red, white, sparkling, dessert) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the wine */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the wine producer */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the wine merchant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the wine */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "region" TEXT /* Wine region */,
  "grape_varieties" TEXT /* List of grape varieties used */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol content percentage */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the bottle */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the wine */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Whether the wine is currently available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wine was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wine information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES wine_producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES wine_merchants ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the review */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Whether the review has been flagged for inappropriate content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the producer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the producer's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the producer was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the producer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the producer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the merchant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the merchant */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the merchant's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the merchant was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the merchant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being recommended */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being recommended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forum was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forum information was last updated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forum moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was created */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the post has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the post */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Whether the post has been flagged for inappropriate content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was posted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been flagged for inappropriate content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES forum_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Administrator's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Administrator's last name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the administrator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the administrator account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the administrator's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "user_engagement" REAL /* User engagement metrics (e.g., number of reviews, ratings, comments) */,
  "wine_ratings" REAL /* Wine ratings metrics (e.g., average rating, number of ratings) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics entry */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of registered users */,
  "active_users" INTEGER /* Number of active users */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings */,
  "total_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments */,
  "total_forum_posts" INTEGER /* Total number of forum posts */,
  "total_forum_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of forum comments */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of all wines */,
  "most_reviewed_wines" TEXT /* JSON array of the most reviewed wines */,
  "most_active_users" TEXT /* JSON array of the most active users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
